category_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub README calls @vscode/vsce the Visual Studio Code Extension Manager.
source_facts.description says vsce packages, publishes, and manages VS Code extensions.
display_name_sources: Official Microsoft repository README uses @vscode/vsce as the package name.
docs_sources: Official Microsoft GitHub README documents usage and points to the VS Code documentation.
source_facts.homepage is the official Visual Studio Code documentation for publishing extensions.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Microsoft GitHub repository is microsoft/vscode-vsce for @vscode/vsce.
tags_sources: Official Microsoft README says the tool assists in packaging and publishing Visual Studio Code extensions.
source_facts.description identifies VS Code extension packaging and publishing.
